message: Implemented correct IDisposable pattern with Dispose(bool)
Removed unused parameter rootIterCount
Fixed parameter order in Edge constructor call
Removed operator== overload on reference type
Removed throw from static constructor, fallback to default factory
Removed unnecessary nested code block
Simplified negated condition with opposite operator
Renamed enum Operation to Operations (S2342 convention)
Suppressed S3376 for compiler-required IsExternalInit type
Removed redundant null-conditional operator after null check
Fixed ArgumentOutOfRangeException param order
Fixed parameter order in swapped branch
Suppressed S101 for EGL native library wrapper class
5x S927 parameter rename to match base declaration
5x S1117 - renamed local vars shadowing fields/params
12x S907 - replaced goto with early returns/loops in GameObject.cs (2) + Archetype.cs (10)
Extracted TransferComponent, FireComponentRemovedEvent, FireComponentRemovedGenericEvent to reduce CC from 28 to ~6
6 issues already fixed externally (S125x2, S3881, S1144, S1118, S3776 AssetRegistry) + 1 S3776 Scene.cs just fixed
BoxCollider: extracted BoxColliderSettings record to reduce param count 13→1
4x S2436 - all already suppressed with [SuppressMessage]
8x S3776 already refactored externally
ContactSolver.SolveVelocityConstraints - extracted 5 helpers
WorldPhysic.SolveToi - extracted ResetToiState, FindMinAlphaContact, BuildToiIsland (CC~45 down under 15)
